← Recipes

Curry-Roasted Cauliflower Bowl

Ingredients

  • 1 red bell pepper, trimmed and thinly sliced
  • 1 yellow onion, peeled and thinly sliced
  • ½ cup wild rice
  • 1 cauliflower head, trimmed and cut into florets
  • 1 tsp curry powder
  • ¼ cup romesco sauce
  • 2 oz Treeline® Dairy-Free Herb Garlic Cheese

From your kitchen

  • 2 tbsp + 1 tsp vegetable oil
  • Salt
  • Pepper

Tools

  • Medium saucepan with lid
  • Foil-lined baking sheet

Directions

  1. Step 1: Cook the rice — Preheat oven to 450°F. Heat 1 tsp vegetable oil in medium saucepan over medium heat. Add bell pepper, onion, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are crisp-tender, 5 to 7 minutes. Add rice, ¾ cup water, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, reduce to a simmer, cover, and cook until grains are tender, 28 to 32 minutes.
  2. Step 2: Cook the cauliflower — Combine 2 tbsp vegetable oil, cauliflower, curry powder, and a pinch of salt on foil-lined baking sheet and toss to coat. Cook until cauliflower is golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes.
  3. Step 3: Serve — Spread romesco on bottom of each bowl and top with wild rice and curry-roasted cauliflower. Dollop with herb garlic cheese. Tuck in!
  4. ---

Nutrition

Nutrition per serving (as packaged) Calories: 380, Fat: 15 g, Sodium: 380 mg, Carbohydrates: 68 g, Protein: 16 g.
Allergens: tree nut (almond, cashew). Manufactured on equipment shared with tree nuts, peanut, sesame, wheat, soy, egg, milk, fish, and shellfish.
Recipe from Purple Carrot.
